# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Cache node_modules, pip packages, and configs
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          node_modules
          ${{ env.HOME }}/.cache/pip
          config-folder
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-dependencies-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Pipfile.lock') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/config-folder/**') }}

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        npm install
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Build
      run: |
        # Your build commands here
